chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ أَوْصَى بِجُزْءٍ مِنْ مَالِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – One who bequeaths with a ‘part’ from his wealth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/68)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) الْجُزْءُ وَاحِدٌ مِنْ عَشَرَةٍ لِأَنَّ الْجِبَالَ عَشَرَةٌ وَ الطُّيُورَ أَرْبَعَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Aban Bin Taghlub who said,
‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The ‘part’ is one from ten, because the mountains were ten, and the birds were four’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Aban ibn Th’alabah who has narrated the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A part is one-tenth because the mountains were ten and the birds were four.’”
